params.name: Sky Award
params.description:
On Feb 25, 2019 AD, the first Sky Award was held in Japan.
The Sky Award is an Asia-wide award aimed at recognizing designs that have a positive impact on society. It covers various fields, providing designers in the Asia-Pacific region with an internationally influential platform to showcase outstanding design to gain more business opportunities!
